title: Email sending failed due to rate limit exceeded
symptom: When attempting to send an email using the Weweb email extension, the user receives a 403 error with the message 'RATE_LIMIT_EXCEDEED'.
not_this_if: User is on a paid plan
root_cause: The Weweb email extension has restrictions based on the user's subscription plan. Free plan users are not allowed to send emails, leading to a rate limit error when they attempt to do so.
fix_steps: Upgrade to a paid plan that allows email sending
Retry sending the email after upgrading
agent_instruction: Upgrade your Weweb plan to a paid subscription to enable email sending.
